response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks demonstrated C++ expertise at the 8-year level required, shows no evidence of large-scale cloud compute infrastructure or distributed systems leadership, and has no clear track record in technical leadership roles mentoring cloud/DevOps teams — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong open-source contributions and community knowledge-sharing
Proven ability to build and lead complex systems from inception
concerns: No measurable C++ experience beyond early career (LabWindows/CVI), insufficient for 8-year requirement
Lacks documented cloud architecture, compute platform, or distributed systems leadership
No evidence of formal technical leadership, mentoring, or ownership of large cloud infrastructure projects
